content:
type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
your_files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
note: Our features both fundamentally require touching cache.py + __init__.py (TTL vs compression/eviction), so a disjoint split isn't possible. Let's both own both files but follow conventions to ease the merge: (1) add new constructor/configure_cache params at the END of the existing parameter list, never reorder existing ones; (2) keep changes localized to lines relevant to your own feature, don't reformat/touch unrelated code; (3) in Cache.get()/put() only add new branches, don't restructure existing control flow. I'll handle merge conflict resolution manually at the end via git merge. OK with this?
